Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC72B "BALLOONING-2000-C72B" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $2000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Ballooning.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $2000 which generates a random number by setting the noise waveform for the voice 3 oscillator of the SID chip. This number is written to $A1 (the second byte of the TI variable) in order to generate a new map each time the game is run.
Also added an initialising message on startup to let the user know the map is being generated instead of just having a blank screen. This is achieved by placing the correct screen RAM data at $0400 and bitmap data at $2000.
The loading screen is based on the Spectrum version.
